summary.intent: Persist open tabs and sessions to localStorage so users resume where they left off when reopening the app.
summary.outcome: Added localStorage persistence to TabsContext.tsx to save/restore tabs and activeTabId, with logic to skip launcher tabs and respect dedicated window tab params.

repo: Tab state is managed centrally in TabsContext.tsx
Launcher tabs represent running processes and should not be persisted to localStorage
Dedicated windows can be opened with a ?tab= URL param, which must be respected over restored state
SessionRow and ActiveSessions components are related to session display/management

code.finding: Central tab state management; modified to add localStorage init/sync with guards for launcher tabs and ?tab= param
Modified as part of session persistence work
Modified as part of session persistence work

workflow: Read key files before editing to understand existing patterns before making changes

open_items: Verify behavior when persisted tabs reference sessions that no longer exist
Consider whether session state (beyond tab identity) also needs to be persisted
